# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:japanese_shogun_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
		owner ?= {
			has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
		}
     	home_country ?= {
			OR = {
     			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
     			has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
			}
     	}
		OR = {
			culture = {
				has_discrimination_trait = language_japanese
			}
			c:JAP ?= home_country
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:japanese_imperial_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		exists = home_country
		trigger_if = {
			limit = {
				owner ?= {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
				}
			}
			has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
		}
		trigger_else = {
			is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
			owner ?= {
				NOR = {
					has_government_type = gov_domain_alliance
					has_government_type = gov_domain_frontier
				}
			}
		}
     	home_country ?= {
			OR = {
     			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
     			has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
			}
     	}
		OR = {
			culture = {
				has_discrimination_trait = language_japanese
			}
			c:JAP ?= home_country
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:chinese_imperial_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
		exists = home_country
     	home_country = {
			OR = {
     			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
     			has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
			}
     	}
		OR = {
			culture = {
				has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han
			}
			AND = {
				exists = c:CHI
				home_country = c:CHI
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:chinese_court_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		NOT = {
			AND = {
				exists = home_country
				is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
				culture = {
					has_discrimination_trait = heritage_tai
					has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_southeast_asian
				}
		     	home_country = {
		     		OR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
			     		has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
			     	}
		     	}
			}
		}
		culture = {
			NOT = { this = cu:kalmyk }
			NOT = { this = cu:korean }
			OR = {
				has_discrimination_trait = tradition_sinosphere
				has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han
				has_discrimination_trait = language_tibetan
				has_discrimination_trait_group = language_group_mongolic
				has_discrimination_trait = heritage_tai
				has_discrimination_trait = language_hmong
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:arabic_fez_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		exists = home_country
		OR = {
			home_country = {
				OR = {
					is_country_type = recognized
					country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
				}
			}
			home_country = {
				top_overlord = {
					OR = {
						is_country_type = recognized
						country_is_colonial_or_company = yes
					}
				}
			}
			home_country = {
				exists = c:EGY
				c:EGY = this
				c:EGY ?= {
					OR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:arabic_military_fez_pop_trigger = {
	exists = scope:pop
	scope:pop = {
		AND = {
			OR = {
				home_country = {
					exists = c:EGY
					c:EGY = this
					c:EGY ?= {
						OR = {
							RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
							has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
						}
					}
				}
				home_country = {
					exists = c:TUR
					c:TUR = this
					c:TUR ?= {
						OR = {
							RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
							has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
						}
					}
				}
				home_country = {
					exists = c:TUN
					c:TUN = this
					c:TUN ?= {
						OR = {
							RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
							has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
						}
					}
				}
				home_country = {
					exists = c:MOR
					c:MOR = this
					c:MOR ?= {
						OR = {
							RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
							has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
						}
					}
				}
			}
			OR = {
				culture = {
					OR = {
						has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_middle_eastern
						has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_central_asian
					}
				}
				AND = { # Albanian characters serving either the Ottomans or Egyptians should wear that country's clothing.
					culture = cu:albanian
					OR = {
						home_country = {
							exists = c:TUR
							c:TUR = this
							c:TUR ?= {
								OR = {
									RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
									has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
								}
							}
						}
						home_country = {
							exists = c:EGY
							c:EGY = this
							c:EGY ?= {
								OR = {
									RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
									has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:arabic_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		OR = {
			culture = {
				OR = {
					has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_middle_eastern
					has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_central_asian #Currently no point having a different check
				}
			}
			AND = {
				culture = {
					has_discrimination_trait = heritage_abyssinian
				}
				religion = {
					NOT = { has_discrimination_trait = heritage_christian }
				}
			}
			culture = cu:circassian
			AND = { # Albanian characters serving either the Ottomans or Egyptians should wear that country's clothing.
				culture = cu:albanian
				exists = home_country
				OR = {
					home_country = {
						exists = c:TUR
						c:TUR = this
						c:TUR ?= {
							OR = {
								RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
								has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
							}
						}
					}
					home_country = {
						exists = c:EGY
						c:EGY = this
						c:EGY ?= {
							OR = {
								RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
								has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:monarchy_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		exists = owner
		NOT = { culture = cu:griqua } # Griqua captains wear plainer clothing
		OR = {
			AND = {
				OR = {
					is_female = yes # Female Regents wear more stylish clothes than male ones, as female regents trend towards being royals themselves
					owner ?= { has_gov_regency = no }
				}
				is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
			}
	     	is_heir_of_own_country = yes
		}
     	owner = {
			OR = {
     			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
     			has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
			}
     	}
	}
}

REPLACE:republic_clothes_trigger = {
	exists = scope:character
	scope:character = {
		exists = home_country
		is_ruler_of_own_country = yes
		OR = {
			culture = cu:griqua
			home_country = {
				NOR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy_or_variant = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_social_monarchy
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:japanese_restoration_trigger = {
	owner ?= {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				c:JAP ?= this
				OR = {
					NOR = {
						RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
						has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
					}
					has_variable = japan_emperor_restored
				}
			}
			AND = {
				NOT = { c:JAP ?= this }
				country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
				has_technology_researched = rifling
			}
		}
	}
}
